title: session handoff and curation commit window preparing
body: Owner ended the Galactic Transiting Galaxy session and asked for jc-session-handoff then commit. Live overlap: Hushed Shrouding Mist owns P0.QG continuity/profile files and Stratospheric Winging Wing owns skill-pruning files. Decision: proceed only on shared session-handoff and curation-retention surfaces under claim 666f1e8e, then commit with explicit pathspecs excluding peer skill source/adapters and cost-of-collaboration implementation files.
